steps.title: Welcome to VoteChain
steps.body: VoteChain lets your community create proposals, vote with token weight, and execute decisions — all transparently on the Stellar blockchain.

steps.title: Connect your wallet
steps.body: Connect a Stellar-compatible wallet (e.g. Freighter) to interact with governance. Your vote weight equals your governance token balance.

steps.title: Create a proposal
steps.body: Any address can submit a proposal. Provide a title, description, quorum threshold (minimum votes required), and voting duration in seconds.

steps.title: Cast your vote
steps.body: During the active voting window, cast Yes, No, or Abstain. Each address may vote exactly once per proposal.

steps.title: Proposal lifecycle
steps.body: After the voting period ends, anyone can finalise the proposal. It passes when total_votes ≥ quorum AND yes > no, then an admin can execute it.

steps.title: You're ready to govern
steps.body: You can revisit this tutorial at any time from the Help menu.
